stemHtml: Consider an aircraft that conforms to CS-23 (aeroplanes) or CS-27 (helicopters), in which the electrical power is provided by a single AC alternator. If this alternator suddenly fails, which of the following will happen?

options.a: AC will be provided to the main bus via a Transformer Rectifier Unit (TRU).
options.b: The DC essential bus will be powered by AC from the battery via a static inverter.
options.c: The DC essential bus will be powered by DC from the battery.
options.d: The battery can provide all necessary electrical power for the duration of the flight.
